roles.description: Redesigned core web architecture, reducing application load times by 35%. Defined frontend architecture and technology stack across products. Built full-stack features integrating Next.js, React, TypeScript and .NET APIs. Established code review standards and mentored junior developers.

Built MutualData, a platform for large-scale financial data processing and visualization. Architected component systems and API integrations for Tus Cuentas, an investment platform. Migrated e-commerce platform from CSHTML to Next.js, improving maintainability. Modernized legacy Angular applications to Next.js architecture.
Built responsive UIs for WSLaMedica, Mis Inversiones and MutualData. Implemented component systems with Next.js, TypeScript, Chakra UI and SASS.

description: Built responsive interfaces with React, Tailwind CSS and Styled Components. Implemented UI animations with Framer Motion. Delivered production-ready frontends integrated with external APIs.
